moments.title: FIFA World Cup Final approaches
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates this Sunday with Spain facing Argentina in the final at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.

angles.name: Global Showpiece
angles.copy: Sunday. Spain vs Argentina. The FIFA World Cup 2026 Final is set! Who are you backing for glory?

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Just three days until the biggest game in football. Spain and Argentina battle for the World Cup crown. Get ready for Sunday!

moments.title: The Open Championship tees off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins today at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in England, running until Sunday, July 19.

angles.name: Golf Major Begins
angles.copy: It's here! The 154th Open Championship gets underway today at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Action
angles.copy: Four days of world-class golf start now! The Open Championship is live from Royal Birkdale. Tune in for all the action.

moments.title: Glasgow prepares for Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games in Glasgow, Scotland, officially kick off with the Opening Ceremony on July 23, running until August 2.

angles.name: Glasgow Gets Ready
angles.copy: Seven days to go! The Commonwealth Games Opening Ceremony lights up Glasgow next Thursday. Ready for some world-class sport?

angles.name: Scotland Hosts
angles.copy: Glasgow is about to welcome the world! The Commonwealth Games are almost here, celebrating sport and culture across the Commonwealth.

moments.title: Heartstopper Forever arrives on Netflix
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated special 'Heartstopper Forever', concluding Nick and Charlie's love story, streams on Netflix from tomorrow, July 17.

angles.name: Heartstopper Finale
angles.copy: Get ready for all the feels! 'Heartstopper Forever' lands on Netflix tomorrow. How will Nick and Charlie's story end?

angles.name: New on Netflix
angles.copy: Your weekend binge sorted! The emotional conclusion to Heartstopper is out tomorrow on Netflix. Tissues at the ready!

moments.title: Will Ferrell's 'The Hawk' streams today
moments.blurb: Will Ferrell stars as an eccentric golf has-been in the new comedy 'The Hawk', available on Netflix UK from today.

angles.name: Ferrell on the Fairway
angles.copy: Will Ferrell's back and he's hitting the golf course! 'The Hawk' is out today on Netflix UK. Get ready for some laughs.

angles.name: Comedy Drop
angles.copy: Need a laugh? Will Ferrell's new film 'The Hawk' is streaming now on Netflix! Perfect for a Thursday night.

moments.title: Enola Holmes 3 streaming now on Netflix
moments.blurb: Millie Bobby Brown returns as the young detective in 'Enola Holmes 3', which is currently streaming on Netflix UK.

angles.name: Enola's Latest Case
angles.copy: Millie Bobby Brown is back as Enola Holmes! Catch the third film in the series, streaming now on Netflix. What mysteries will she solve?

angles.name: Family Film Fun
angles.copy: Looking for something to watch tonight? 'Enola Holmes 3' is ready for you on Netflix UK. Adventure awaits!

moments.title: Stewart Copeland turns 74
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the legendary drummer of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday today.

angles.name: Police Drummer Bday
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the iconic Stewart Copeland! The drumming powerhouse behind The Police. What's your favourite Police track?

angles.name: Rock Legend Bday
angles.copy: A huge drum roll for Stewart Copeland, who turns 74 today! Still rocking after all these years with The Police.

moments.title: Rubén Blades celebrates 78th birthday
moments.blurb: Panamanian salsa singer, songwriter, and actor Rubén Blades turns 78 today.

angles.name: Salsa Legend Bday
angles.copy: Feliz Cumpleaños to the incredible Rubén Blades, celebrating his 78th birthday today! A true icon of salsa music and storytelling.

angles.name: Music & Activism
angles.copy: Singer, songwriter, actor, activist – Rubén Blades turns 78 today! Celebrating a legend whose music transcends borders.

moments.title: Geezer Butler turns 77
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the influential bassist and lyricist for Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Metal Pioneer Bday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the 77th birthday of Black Sabbath's legendary bassist and lyricist, Geezer Butler! The architect of heavy metal's dark poetry.

angles.name: Sabbath Bassist
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th to Geezer Butler tomorrow! What's your favourite Black Sabbath riff he helped create?

moments.title: Wolfgang Flür turns 79
moments.blurb: Wolfgang Flür, the former electronic percussionist of the pioneering German band Kraftwerk, celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Electronic Music Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday tomorrow to Wolfgang Flür of Kraftwerk! A true innovator who shaped electronic music as we know it.

angles.name: Kraftwerk Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Wolfgang Flür's 79th birthday tomorrow! His work with Kraftwerk laid the foundations for so much modern dance music.

moments.title: Dion DiMucci turns 87
moments.blurb: Dion DiMucci, the iconic singer known for his work with Dion and the Belmonts and solo hits, celebrates his 87th birthday on Friday.

angles.name: Doo-Wop Icon Bday
angles.copy: On Friday, we celebrate the 87th birthday of the one and only Dion DiMucci! From 'Runaround Sue' to 'The Wanderer', a true rock & roll legend.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 87th to Dion DiMucci this Friday! His voice defined an era. What's your favourite Dion classic?

moments.title: Martha Reeves turns 85
moments.blurb: Martha Reeves, the legendary lead singer of Martha and the Vandellas, will celebrate her 85th birthday on Friday.

angles.name: Motown Queen Bday
angles.copy: Get ready to dance in the street! Martha Reeves of Martha and the Vandellas turns 85 this Friday. A true Motown icon!

angles.name: Soulful Celebration
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 85th birthday to the incredible Martha Reeves this Friday! Her voice is pure soul.

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: The legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his pioneering fusion of rock and Latin American jazz, celebrates his 79th birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: Guitar Icon Bday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Carlos Santana this Sunday! His guitar work is instantly recognisable and truly iconic.

angles.name: Latin Rock Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Carlos Santana's 79th this Sunday! A musical pioneer whose sound continues to inspire.

moments.title: Kim Carnes turns 81
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Kim Carnes, best known for her hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', celebrates her 81st birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: Bette Davis Eyes Singer
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday this Sunday to Kim Carnes! Still got 'Bette Davis Eyes' for this amazing singer-songwriter.

angles.name: 80s Pop Icon
angles.copy: A big birthday shout-out to Kim Carnes, turning 81 on Sunday! Her distinctive voice defined an era.

moments.title: George Clinton turns 85
moments.blurb: George Clinton, the legendary leader of Parliament-Funkadelic and an innovator of funk music, celebrates his 85th birthday on Tuesday.

angles.name: Funk Master Bday
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the undisputed 'Godfather of Funk', George Clinton, this Tuesday! Get on up for the P-Funk architect!

angles.name: P-Funk Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating George Clinton's 85th this Tuesday! His influence on funk, soul, and hip-hop is immeasurable. What's your favourite Parliament-Funkadelic jam?

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and lead vocalist of The Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on Tuesday.

angles.name: Eagles Legend Bday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Don Henley this Tuesday! A voice and a talent that defined a generation with The Eagles.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Don Henley's 79th on Tuesday! From 'Hotel California' to his solo hits, a true rock icon.

moments.title: Selena Gomez turns 34
moments.blurb: Pop superstar, actress, and producer Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on Tuesday.

angles.name: Pop Star Bday
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the multi-talented Selena Gomez this Tuesday! From Disney to global pop sensation, what's your favourite track?

angles.name: Celebrating Selena
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 34th birthday to Selena Gomez on Tuesday! A true force in music and entertainment.

moments.title: Verdine White turns 75
moments.blurb: Verdine White, the iconic bassist of Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday on Friday, July 25.

angles.name: Earth, Wind & Fire Bassist
angles.copy: On Friday, July 25th, the incredible Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire turns 75! Get ready to groove and celebrate a funk legend.

angles.name: Funk Icon Bday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday this Friday to Verdine White! His basslines are pure magic with Earth, Wind & Fire. What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Jim McCarty turns 83
moments.blurb: Jim McCarty, the influential drummer for The Yardbirds and Renaissance, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Friday, July 25.

angles.name: Yardbirds Drummer Bday
angles.copy: A rock legend turns 83 this Friday! Happy Birthday to Jim McCarty, drummer for The Yardbirds. His beats shaped a generation.

angles.name: Psychedelic Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 83rd to Jim McCarty on Friday! Celebrate with some classic Yardbirds tracks.

moments.title: HebCelt Festival underway in Outer Hebrides
moments.blurb: The HebCelt Festival, a celebration of Celtic music and culture, is taking place today in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, as part of the King's Baton Relay for the Commonwealth Games.

angles.name: HebCelt Live
angles.copy: The HebCelt Festival is rocking Stornoway today! Celebrating the best of Celtic music and culture in the Outer Hebrides.

angles.name: Scottish Culture
angles.copy: Immerse yourself in Celtic traditions! The HebCelt Festival is live today, bringing incredible music and atmosphere to Scotland.
